name: Buddy Technologies Limited
description: Buddy Technologies Limited, formerly Buddy Platform Limited, is an Australia-based company that provides internet of things (IoT) and cloud-based solutions. The company's products include Buddy Ohm, an energy monitoring and management solution for commercial buildings, and LIFX, a provider of smart, Wi-Fi enabled LED light bulbs. Buddy Technologies enables customers to collect, process, and analyze data from various devices and systems to optimize energy consumption, reduce costs, and improve operational efficiency.
